generation_method: Generated as standalone UI elements with the built-in image generation path requested as gpt-image-2 style output; no crop/cutout was used from the design reference.
alpha_note: Most generated PNG files are RGB and do not contain real alpha pixels. The action point badge, split player bars, split enemy bars, chain meter, chain point token, draw pile panel, discard pile panel and end turn button were regenerated on chroma-key backgrounds and post-processed to true alpha. Treat other files as generated concept components / style references unless regenerated with a native transparency-capable path or separately alpha-processed.

font_policy.source_metadata: The design image is an AI-generated flat bitmap, so it has no embedded readable font metadata.

components.runtime_role: Opaque battle background reference with no HUD/cards/characters.

Top-left player health bar with heart icon, generated as a standalone replacement for the first row of the combined player HUD. This file has true alpha and contains no text or numbers; Godot should draw health values dynamically.

Top-left player block/shield bar with shield icon, generated as a standalone replacement for the second row of the combined player HUD. This file has true alpha and contains no text or numbers; Godot should draw block values dynamically.

Top-right enemy name bar generated as a standalone replacement for the first row of the combined enemy HUD. This file has true alpha and contains no text or numbers; Godot should draw the enemy name dynamically.

Top-right enemy health bar with heart icon, generated as a standalone replacement for the second row of the combined enemy HUD. This file has true alpha and contains no text or numbers; Godot should draw enemy health values dynamically.

Top-right enemy block/shield bar with shield icon, generated as a standalone replacement for the third row of the combined enemy HUD. This file has true alpha and contains no text or numbers; Godot should draw enemy block values dynamically.

Eight-slot empty chain meter generated to match the design reference. This file has true alpha and contains no text or filled red point; Godot should draw slot filling by placing chain point tokens into the slots.
Standalone red chain point token generated to fit inside the empty chain meter slots. This file has true alpha and contains no text or numbers.
Bottom-left AP badge generated to match the design reference. This file has true alpha and leaves the center blank; Godot should draw the current AP number and AP label dynamically.
Bottom-left draw pile stack and empty brush panel generated to match the design reference. This file has true alpha and contains no label/count text; Godot should draw label/count dynamically.
Bottom-right discard pile stack and empty brush panel generated to match the design reference. This file has true alpha and contains no label/count text; Godot should draw label/count dynamically.
Bottom-right end turn button frame generated to match the design reference. This file has true alpha and contains no label text; Godot should draw the button label and states dynamically.
